customStopZone.heading: Custom Stop Zone
customStopZone.tooltip: Draw a zone on screen that stops clicking when your cursor enters it.

cornerStop.heading: Corner Stop
cornerStop.tooltip: Stops the clicker when the cursor enters a screen corner.
cornerStop.disabledReason: Enable Corner Stop to edit the corner failsafe hitboxes.

edgeStop.heading: Edge Stop
edgeStop.tooltip: Stops the clicker when the cursor reaches a screen edge.
edgeStop.disabledReason: Enable Edge Stop to edit the edge failsafe hitboxes.

processList.heading: Process List
processList.tooltip: Pause or stop clicking when certain applications are focused.
processList.emptyWarning: Whitelist mode is active with no applications selected. Clicking will be blocked everywhere.
processList.disabledReason: Enable Process List to manage application rules.
